unauthorized: You need to sign in to do that.
forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
internal: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.

quota.student_exceeded: You've reached your daily token quota for this course.
quota.owner_exceeded: The course owner has reached their daily AI spending cap. Contact lambda@dsv.su.se to request an increase.

privacy.not_acknowledged: You must acknowledge the privacy notice before using chat.

doc.file_too_large: File is too large ({{size_bytes}} bytes, max {{max_mb}} MB).

service.status_changed_concurrently: The document's status changed while we were processing it. Please try again.
service.url_invalid_length: URL must be between 1 and 2048 characters.

external_auth.eppn_invalid_length: EPPN must be between 1 and 200 characters.

api_keys.name_invalid_length: Name must be between 1 and 100 characters.

admin.cannot_suspend_self: You can't suspend your own account.
admin.condition_operator_invalid: Operator must be one of contains, not_contains, regex, not_regex.

chat.feedback_only_assistant: Feedback can only be left on assistant messages.

signed_url.max_uses_reached: This invite link has reached its maximum number of uses.

canvas.base_url_and_token_required: Canvas base URL and API token are required.
canvas.unreachable: Couldn't reach Canvas. Check your base URL and API token.
canvas.fetch_file_metadata_failed: Couldn't fetch file metadata from Canvas: {{detail}}
canvas.file_too_large: Canvas file is too large to import ({{size_bytes}} bytes).
canvas.page_too_large: Canvas page is too large to import ({{size_bytes}} bytes).

warning.files_unavailable: Files API unavailable ({{detail}}). Falling back to Modules for file discovery.
warning.modules_unavailable: Modules API unavailable ({{detail}}). Only top-level Files will be synced.

lti.client_id_required: client_id is required in the login initiation request.
lti.no_registration: No LTI registration found for issuer={{issuer}}, client_id={{client_id}}.
lti.invalid_or_expired_state: Invalid or expired LTI launch state.
lti.deployment_id_missing: JWT is missing the deployment_id claim.
lti.registration_duplicate: An LTI registration with this issuer and client_id already exists.
lti.no_jwks_key: No matching key in the platform's JWKS.

play.designation_invalid_length: Designation must be between 1 and 64 characters.
play.designation_invalid_chars: Designation must not contain whitespace or slashes.
play.designation_duplicate: That designation is already attached to this course.
